source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
<image_1> In the transition-state structure shown in the image, calculate the total number of bonds in the structure, including single, double, and triple bonds but excluding those involving hydrogen.

Note: Disregard arrows. Consider all components present in the transition-state structure shown in the image.
extraction_notes: image_1 is present as a PIL.Image object placeholder, not a path or URL

issues: metadata.extraction_notes indicates image_1 was present as a PIL.Image placeholder rather than a path or URL at extraction time
metadata.image_paths is empty while the top-level image_paths field contains an image path

image_dependency: 题干显式说“shown in the image”并要求基于过渡态结构计数键数，核心信息来自图片
requires_image=true 且 text_dominant=false，说明不能仅靠文字完成
需要识别结构中的键型与组成部分，属于明显视觉依赖任务
multi_step: 需要先识别图中所有组成部分，再统计总键数
题干要求同时计入 single、double、triple bonds，并排除与氢有关的键，至少包含多条计数规则
还要求忽略 arrows，说明需区分反应标记与真实结构元素，存在一定多步筛选
verifiability: answer_type 为 numeric，标准答案为明确数值 18，结果形式清晰
题目目标是有限对象计数，若图像可见则可通过规则或人工复核答案
asset_registry_record.registry_passed=true，且图像文件 exists=true，具备基本核验条件

risk_flags: metadata.extraction_notes indicates image_1 was present as a PIL.Image placeholder rather than a path or URL at extraction time
metadata.image_paths is empty while the top-level image_paths field contains an image path

decision_reasons: 题干、答案与图像资产均存在，且该题核心语义所需的视觉信息可由现有图片支撑
初步打分显示图像依赖高且可核验性较强，数值答案明确，适合进入候选池
现有风险主要是元数据记录不一致，而不是核心资产缺失，不足以在高召回阶段降为 reject
